title: Require Agent Plugin Lifecycle Service Topology
forbids: a second lifecycle service shell, a different module inventory, or nonuniform module roots
why: Curated agent-plugin lifecycle is one oRPC service whose six capability modules share one package topology. Populated module models narrow into domain categories without becoming peer services.
remediate: Keep lifecycle behavior in the canonical service, preserve the six-module inventory, and place module-specific implementation under internal or a declared model category.
message: Agent-plugin lifecycle must retain its closed one-service, six-module oRPC topology.
